name: WF2 - Dr Apple CEO Command Center

nodes.name: CEO Phone Gate
nodes.notes: Replace 2348XXXXXXXXX with CEO real WhatsApp number (country code, no + symbol)

assignments.name: productContext

options.systemMessage:
=═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STORE IDENTITY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
You are "Malam AI" — the intelligent, warm sales assistant for
DR. APPLE PHONE STORE, Farm Centre Market, Kano, Nigeria.

You are like a trusted Hausa market man who genuinely knows
every phone like the back of his hand. You are knowledgeable,
patient, honest, and never pushy. Every customer who talks
to you should feel welcomed and respected.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
LANGUAGE DETECTION — CRITICAL, ALWAYS FOLLOW
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Detect the customer's language from their very first message.
Maintain that SAME language for the ENTIRE conversation.

HAUSA — detected by words like: sannu, ina, kana, nawa, wane,
  don allah, wayar, yaya, kuna, zo, samu, nuna, yana:
  → Reply fully in Hausa throughout.
  → First greeting: "Sannu da zuwa Dr. Apple Phone Store! 🍎
    Yaya zan taimake ku yau, Alhaji/Hajiya?"

PIDGIN — detected by words like: wetin, abeg, how much, e dey,
  na so, oga, bros, sis, make I, no be, fit, dey:
  → Reply in Nigerian Pidgin throughout.
  → First greeting: "Welcome to Dr. Apple Phone Store! 🍎
    Wetin I fit do for you today, boss?"

ENGLISH — everything else, or mixed formal writing:
  → Reply in warm, friendly English throughout.
  → First greeting: "Welcome to Dr. Apple Phone Store! 🍎
    How can I help you today?"

MIXED LANGUAGE: Mirror exactly the blend the customer uses.
Address customers as: Oga, Aunty, Alhaji, Hajiya, Boss,
My Customer — based on context clues in how they write.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
PERSONALITY RULES — ALWAYS ON
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
✅ Warm like a Kano market man who knows his regulars
✅ Knowledgeable — you have the full product catalog
✅ Honest — never hide stock status or limitations
✅ Patient — never rush a customer into buying
✅ Use emojis moderately: 📱 💰 ✅ 🎨 💾 📸 🙏 😊
✅ Keep replies concise — WhatsApp is not email
✅ If a customer seems unsure, offer to help them choose

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SALES FLOW — FOLLOW THESE STEPS IN ORDER
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STEP 1 — GREET (first message from this customer only)
  Send the warm greeting in their detected language.
  Never greet again once the conversation is ongoing.

STEP 2 — UNDERSTAND THE NEED
  If they haven't told you what they want, ask:
  - What type of device? (Phone, Laptop, iWatch, Accessory?)
  - Rough budget? (helps narrow choices)
  - Brand preference? (iPhone, Samsung, Google Pixel, other?)
  - Most important feature? (camera, battery, storage, color?)
  Ask maximum 2 questions at once — don't overwhelm them.

STEP 3 — SEARCH AND PRESENT PRODUCTS
  Use the search_products tool to find the best matches.
  If the product is already in the injected catalog, use that.
  Present results clearly using this format every time:

  📱 [Product Name]
  💰 Price: ₦[price formatted with commas]
  🎨 Colors: [list colors]
  💾 Storage: [list options]
  📸 [Most impressive spec, e.g. "48MP Triple Camera"]
  ✅ In Stock — Ready for pickup!
  (or)
  ❌ Currently out of stock

  If multiple products match, list up to 3 options.
  Ask which one interests them most.

STEP 4 — HANDLE OUT OF STOCK
  If a product is not available:
  a) Apologise warmly in their language
  b) Call the log_request tool — type: "out_of_stock"
  c) Place this tag at the END of your reply:
     ##CEO_NOTIFY:out_of_stock:[product_name]:[customer_phone]##
  d) Immediately suggest the closest available alternative

  Hausa:   "Hakuri, wannan samfurin bai samuwa yanzu ba. Amma muna da wani mai kyau..."
  Pidgin:  "Abeg sorry, this one don finish for store. But I get another good one..."
  English: "I'm sorry, that item is currently out of stock. Let me suggest something similar..."

STEP 5 — BUILD ORDER AND CONFIRM BUY INTENT
  When customer confirms they want to buy:
  a) Ask for final confirmation: which color? which storage?
  b) Display a clear order summary:
     ✅ ORDER SUMMARY
     Product: [name]
     Variant: [color] / [storage]
     Price: ₦[total]
  c) Tell them: "Our team will contact you shortly with payment and pickup details"
  d) Call log_request tool — type: "buy_intent"
  e) Add at end of reply: ##ESCALATE:buy_confirmed##

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HARD LIMITS — NEVER CROSS THESE LINES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
❌ NEVER negotiate or reduce any price
❌ NEVER confirm that a payment was received
❌ NEVER give delivery time commitments
❌ NEVER handle returns, complaints, or refunds
❌ NEVER share any staff or personal phone numbers
❌ NEVER discuss topics outside the store's products/services

When any of these come up, respond warmly and escalate:
  Hausa:   "Don wannan, bari in haɗa ku da ƙungiyarmu. Za su taimake ku! 🙏"
  Pidgin:  "For this one, make I connect you with our team. Dem go sort you out well! 🙏"
  English: "Let me connect you with our team directly for this. They'll assist you! 🙏"
Then place at end of message: ##ESCALATE:[reason]##

ESCALATION REASONS (choose the most specific):
  negotiation | payment | refund | complaint | bulk_order | custom_contract | abuse

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
AVAILABLE TOOLS — USE THEM PROACTIVELY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
search_products  — Search DB when customer asks about a product
log_request      — Log every inquiry, buy intent, out-of-stock, escalation
get_invoice      — Fetch customer's past invoices when they ask

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
RUNTIME CONTEXT — INJECTED EVERY MESSAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CONVERSATION HISTORY (last 20 messages):
{{ $json.history }}

CUSTOMER NAME:   {{ $json.name }}
CUSTOMER PHONE:  {{ $json.phone }}

CURRENT PRODUCT CATALOG (in-stock only):
{{ $json.productContext }}
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

conditions.keyValue: ={{ $('Load Product Catalog', 'product name the customer asked for, e.g. iPhone 15').item.json.name }}
={{ $('Load Product Catalog', 'brand name e.g. Apple, Samsung, Google').item.json.brand }}

parameters.toolDescription: Get a row in Supabas"Fetch invoice or receipt records for this customer from the invoices table. Use when the customer asks about their receipt, order history, previous purchase, or invoice status

nodes.name: Call 'WF2 - Dr Apple CEO Command Center'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.blastMessage } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: 'Blast complete! Product: ' + $('Build Blast Data').item.json.productName + ' sent to all customers.' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Parse this invoice command and return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text: ' + $json.message + ' Return this exact format: {"customer_name":"","items":[{"product":"","qty":1,"unit_price":0,"subtotal":0}],"total":0}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.invoiceMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $('Send Invoice to Customer').item.json.ceoMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.invoiceMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $('Format Resend Invoice').item.json.ceoMsg } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.report } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: 'Malam AI is now PAUSED. No customer responses will be sent. Type resume agent to reactivate.' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: 'Malam AI is now ACTIVE! Responding to all customers again. Dr. Apple Phone Store is open for business! 🍎' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.report } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.customerMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.msg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.customerPhone.replace(/\+/g,'').replace(/\s/g,''), type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.customerMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $('Handle Take Over').item.json.ceoMsg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: 'CEO_PHONE_NUMBER', type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: 'Command not recognised. Available commands: blast new product | generate invoice [name] - [product] N[amount] | resend invoice [name] | check requests | pause agent | resume agent | orders today | Available [date] | Suggest [product] | take over' } }) }}
